title: MRC Annual Report — Fiscal Year 2012 (mass.gov capture)
description: Captured text of the Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission 'Working as One MRC' Annual Report for Federal Fiscal Year 2012. Primary source for the FY2012 MRC Senior Management Team — Charles Carr (Commissioner), Kasper Goshgarian (Deputy Commissioner), Richard Arcangeli (General Counsel), Robert Perry (CFO), Debra Kamen (Asst Commissioner, Community Living), Joan Phillips (Asst Commissioner, Vocational Rehabilitation), and Barbara Kinney (Assistant Commissioner, Disability Determination Services) — establishing the pre-2015 DDS-Det Asst-Commissioner incumbent. Also reports DDS SSI/DI caseload and budget metrics for FY12 (94,698 dispositions, 95% initial accuracy, $45.8M DDS budget). Source document underpinning the earliest leadership-chain entries in the synthesized timeline.

source.publisher: Commonwealth of Massachusetts — Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission (MRC)
source.title: Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission Annual Report Fiscal Year 2012

notes: Authoritative: capture of MRC's own published FY2012 annual report (primary government document). temporal_coverage uses the federal fiscal year (Oct 1 2011 – Sep 30 2012) the report covers, per its own note that 'the federal fiscal year runs from October 1 through September 30'. The capture is from a DOC/PDF source: the tail of the file contains mojibake/binary-extraction artifacts (garbled lines after the administrative-office address block) that should be ignored; the substantive narrative, senior-team roster, and metric tables are intact. No columns/row_count — narrative markdown.
